O

oArgumentos() - Method in record class br.com.rafael.discordframework.command.CommandParser.ParsedCommand
Returns the value of the oArgumentos record component.
obterCooldown() - Method in class br.com.rafael.discordframework.command.RegisteredCommand
 
obterEvento() - Method in class br.com.rafael.discordframework.command.CommandContext
Retorna o evento original do JDA quando este contexto veio do Discord.

Retorna o JDA.
obterNome() - Method in class br.com.rafael.discordframework.command.RegisteredCommand
 
obterPermissao() - Method in class br.com.rafael.discordframework.command.RegisteredCommand
 
obterSegundosRestantes(String) - Method in class br.com.rafael.discordframework.cooldown.CooldownManager
Retorna quantos segundos faltam para uma chave sair do cooldown.
oConteudoOriginal() - Method in record class br.com.rafael.discordframework.command.CommandParser.ParsedCommand
Returns the value of the oConteudoOriginal record component.
onMessageReceived(MessageReceivedEvent) - Method in class br.com.rafael.discordframework.event.EventDispatcher
Recebe mensagens do Discord e inicia o fluxo de execução quando identifica um comando registrado.
oNomeComando() - Method in record class br.com.rafael.discordframework.command.CommandParser.ParsedCommand
Returns the value of the oNomeComando record component.
